LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TUNG WING ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR: (1) ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ENFORCE STIPULATED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT; (2) AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES OF $2340 PER CCC 1717 AND THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. FEES AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,480.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
